subject: A humanoid figure in white and red patterned clothing surfs or slides across a lava field amid massive flames, one arm raised, trailing arcs of fire
description: A humanoid figure crouches in a low dynamic pose on a black volcanic surface surrounded by flowing lava and erupting flame. They wear a white outfit with geometric red patterning — circular and striped motifs visible on the chest and skirt. One arm is raised overhead while the other trails behind, and arcs of fire loop around their body in curving ribbons. Their expression reads as exhilarated. The background is a wall of orange-red fire and dark mountain silhouettes. The art style is painterly with strong motion blur in the fire arcs. This is Ral Zarek depicted in the saga card context — Wizards-internal IP, no suspected_ip flag needed.
foreground: figure in white-red outfit crouching on lava field amid fire arcs
background: erupting fire wall, dark volcanic mountain silhouettes, lava flows
